title: phyllanthus websterianus
intro: Phyllanthus websterianus, also known as Webster's Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus websterianus include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
